meta.note: Weighted poststratified estimates; shares in percent.

modes.label: What Americans with a view said

response_universe.explainer: In "What Americans with a view said," we remove unsure/no-opinion responses and rescale the remaining responses to sum to 100%.

metrics.label: I'm confident the elections will take place and be conducted fairly
I believe the elections will take place but have concerns about whether they'll be fair
I have serious doubts about whether the elections will take place as scheduled
